meaning: n.盖屋的材料,茅草屋顶,浓密的头发vt.用茅草覆盖屋顶
examples: They would live in a small house with a green door and a new thatch.
Thatch which has been done the British way lasts from twenty to sixty years, and is effective defiance against the heat.
Thatch which has been done the British way lasts from twenty to sixty years, and is an effective defiance against the heat.
The remains of thatch-covered stalls in Rubkona smoldered for hours after the morning bombing, Boswell said.
Apart from a new mosque, its buildings are made of mud, stone and thatch.
